## TRM1.3. Adherence to ATFM slots (PI#1) {#trm1.3.-adherence-to-atfm-slots-pi1 .Heading-2-TZ}

ATFM slot adherence in 2025 was equal to 98.6%, the same as 2024 value -- last year of RP3. All individual airports had adherence above 97%. With regard to the 1.4% of flights that did not adhere, 0.5% were early and 0.9% were late.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of ATFM slot adherence across Member States in 2025 was 96.1%.
